map_npcs.name: Wandering Trainer
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue: I've done it, I finally know how to breathe!

map_npcs.name: Wandering Trainer
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue: This isn't even my final form!

map_npcs.name: Wandering Trainer
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue: Oh, hi there, fighty fighty time?

map_npcs.name: Wandering Trainer
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue: Today's episode is sponsored by the letter 3.

map_npcs.name: Wandering Trainer
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue: Don't think about the lore implications of this area, okay?

map_npcs.name: Wandering Trainer
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue: Hello, yes, I would like to purchase one battle please!

map_npcs.name: Wandering Trainer
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue: Is playing the triangle supposed to be this hard!?
